title: Rebel Yell
why_this_song: Rebel Yell by Billy Idol (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "In the midnight hour, babe "More, more, more""
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "In the midnight hour, she cried "More, more, more""
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "In the midnight hour, she cried "More, more, more""
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "In the midnight hour, she cried "More, more, more""
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "With a rebel yell she cried "More, more, more" wow!"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: With a rebel yell "More, more, more"
She don't like slavery, she won't sit and beg
But when I'm tired and lonely she sleeps in bed

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "babe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "babe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cried" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cried" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In the midnight hour, babe "More, more, more"
Collects it to go from the 7-Eleven
In the midnight hour babe, "More, more, more"

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With a rebel yell "More, more, more"

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Rebel Yell" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Rebel Yell" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
